notes: Set MSP from the first word in the image and PC from the second word.
Patch table lives at seed_base + 0x40 and defaults to QEMU lm3s6965evb PL011 UART0 values.
Patch flags bit 0 enables UART, bit 1 enables RX, bit 2 enables TX, bit 3 selects debugger-only mode, bit 4 marks shared status semantics.
Use Forth-like words such as WORDS, INFO, PATCH, @, !, C@, C!, DUMP, LOAD, CRC32, and BOOT.
Example upload flow: 20001000 10 LOAD then 16 bytes of hex data, then 20001000 BOOT.
